prior_phase_status: P2 Directory Modules approved and committed
P3 Bookings Module approved and committed
P4 Dashboard and Calendar approved and committed
P5 Billing and History approved and committed
P6 Admin Module approved and committed as 61a6252
backend_reads_performed: No new P7 backend reads are required at phase start because P7 is a hardening phase with no new feature contracts.
Use the cached P6 backend context at PROMPTS/SESSION/session_context.json for the most recent verified permission/admin facts.
If a hardening fix touches a backend contract, endpoint, DTO, permission, or business rule, stop and request a targeted SSH read before changing that behavior.
known_validation_context: Previous Codex review attempts saw flutter analyze --no-pub time out after 180 seconds in this environment. Do not ignore analyzer failures; run validation locally and report exact output or exact timeout/failure.
Current uncommitted non-implementation artifacts may include PROMPTS/, .vscode/, devtools_options.yaml, and deleted gemini_*prompt.json files. Do not modify or commit them as part of implementation.

objective: Perform a production-readiness hardening pass across the completed Flutter app without adding new backend features or changing approved business rules.

conditional_only: android/** only if required to fix a verified Android release build failure
ios/** only if working on macOS and required to fix a verified iOS build failure

behaviors: Do not alter P1 auth restoration, bearer token attachment, logout semantics, or router auth gating except to add safe global 403/error handling that preserves existing 401 logout behavior.
Do not alter P2 generator inventory classification or permanent-generator exclusion from booking flows.
Do not alter P3 booking rules: retailer-first assignment, emergency fallback only with explicit user confirmation, merge confirmation, cancellation, and bulk update minimum-one-item enforcement.
Do not alter P4 dashboard/calendar endpoint paths or permission gating.
Do not alter P5 billing endpoint paths, billing field mapping, or backend-limited history behavior.
Do not alter P6 admin backend-limited behavior: no invented JSON admin endpoints, no HTML scraping, no WebView admin wrapper, and no role-label UI gating.
Do not add new backend API assumptions. P7 is hardening, not feature expansion.
contracts: Keep all API paths exactly as previously approved unless a targeted SSH read proves a backend change.
Keep all DTO JSON keys exactly as previously approved unless a targeted SSH read proves a backend change.
Keep all permission checks based on named PermissionService capability constants.

backend_truth.phase_scope: No new backend functionality is in scope for P7.
known_global_network_behavior: ApiClient currently attaches Bearer tokens on authenticated requests.
ApiClient currently handles 401 globally by calling AuthProvider.logout unless requestOptions.extra.skipAuthHandler is true.
P7 should add or centralize user-facing 403 handling only if it can be done without breaking existing provider-level permission messages.
backend_truth.hardening_policy: When a fix requires backend-specific facts not already present in approved code or cached session context, stop and ask Codex for a targeted SSH verification before implementing that fix.

required_fixes.requirement: Audit every app screen and widget for loading, empty, error, and permission-denied states.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: No screen may fail as a blank page or spinner-only dead end. Empty states must explain what is missing. Error states must offer retry or recovery where appropriate.

required_fixes.requirement: Harden network error handling for timeouts, offline/network failures, 401, 403, 404, and 5xx responses.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: 401 remains globally handled through graceful logout/re-login. 403 must be user-facing and must not look like empty data. 404 and 5xx must show actionable messages. Avoid duplicating inconsistent per-screen error parsers if a shared helper is safer.

Interactive controls should have semantic labels where icons/text are insufficient, tap targets should be at least 48x48dp, forms should have clear labels and validation messages, and loading/error/empty states should be screen-reader understandable.

required_fixes.requirement: Verify large-list behavior and pagination/lazy rendering.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Lists that can grow large should use lazy builders. Do not invent backend pagination if no endpoint support exists; if backend pagination is absent, document that limitation and avoid fake client-side pagination that hides data.

required_fixes.requirement: Remove or resolve production TODO/FIXME/placeholder code paths.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: There must be no TODO, FIXME, placeholder scaffolds, mock data, fake endpoints, or debug-only behavior in production code paths.

required_fixes.requirement: Add or repair tests where low-risk and useful.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: At minimum, keep the existing bootstrap smoke test passing. Add focused widget/unit tests for shared error/access states only if they do not require backend or fragile timing.

required_fixes.requirement: Run production validation commands and report exact results.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Run flutter analyze, flutter test, and an Android release build. If iOS build is not available in the current environment, say so explicitly. If a command times out, report the command and timeout.

optional_improvements: Introduce small shared UI components for loading, empty, error, and access-denied states if this reduces duplication without risky refactors.
Introduce a small shared API error formatter if it reduces inconsistent DioException handling without changing approved business behavior.
Improve visual consistency of hardening states while preserving the existing app design language.
acceptance_criteria: 1. All production screens have explicit loading, empty, error, and permission-denied states where applicable.
2. 401 behavior remains globally handled and does not recurse during logout.
3. 403 errors are user-facing and are not silently converted into empty states.
4. No hardcoded mock data, invented endpoints, HTML scraping, or WebView admin management is introduced.
5. No approved P1-P6 backend route, DTO key, permission capability, or booking business rule is changed without targeted SSH verification.
6. No TODO/FIXME/placeholder production code paths remain.
7. Tap targets and semantic labels are acceptable for core navigation, icon-only controls, forms, and action buttons.
8. flutter analyze result is reported exactly.
9. flutter test result is reported exactly.
10. Android release build result is reported exactly; iOS release build is attempted only on a supported macOS environment and otherwise documented as not run.
11. Output includes a concise file-by-file summary of changes and any accepted limitations.

must_report: Validation commands run with exact results
Any limitations intentionally left for operator acceptance
output_contract.commit_boundary_note: Do not stage or commit anything. Codex will review and declare the commit boundary after P7 is approved.
